parameters.name: deploy_meeting_bot
parameters.description: Deploy a transcription bot to a Google Meet, Teams, or Zoom meeting. The bot joins and transcribes the conversation. Parameters: meeting_url (required, full meeting URL), language (optional, e.g. 'en', 'de'), bot_name (optional, display name in meeting), recording (optional, true/false)

value.meeting_url: ={{ $fromAI('meeting_url', 'Full meeting URL (Google Meet, Teams, or Zoom)', 'string') }}
value.language: ={{ $fromAI('language', 'Transcription language code (e.g. en, de). Optional, default auto-detect.', 'string') }}
value.bot_name: ={{ $fromAI('bot_name', 'Display name for the bot in the meeting. Optional.', 'string') }}

schema.description: Full meeting URL (Google Meet, Teams, or Zoom)
Display name for the bot in the meeting

parameters.name: get_transcript
parameters.description: Get the transcript of a meeting. Parameters: platform (google_meet/teams/zoom), meeting_id (the native meeting ID), OR meeting_url (full URL, platform and ID are extracted automatically)

parameters.name: share_transcript
parameters.description: Create a temporary shareable link for a meeting transcript (valid ~15 min). Parameters: platform (google_meet/teams/zoom), meeting_id, OR meeting_url

parameters.name: list_bots
parameters.description: List all currently running Vexa meeting bots. No parameters needed.

parameters.name: stop_bot
parameters.description: Stop and remove a bot from a meeting. Parameters: platform (google_meet/teams/zoom), meeting_id, OR meeting_url
